user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of confirmation letter templates with their type and description, so that I can manage the letters issued during confirmation
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Letter Templates screen; When the page loads; Then letter templates are listed with Template Type ID, Letter Type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a specific letter template such as Employee Confirmation or Probation Extension, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given a letter template is listed; When I click View on that row; Then the template details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the letter templates list, so that I see the latest templates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Letter Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
